parameters.query: =SELECT t.id AS transaction_id, t.amount_cents, t.paid_at, t.status, t.payment_method, t.installments, t.provider_name FROM checkout_simples.transactions t JOIN checkout_simples.checkouts ch ON ch.id=t.checkout_id WHERE ch.external_ref='{{ ($json.body && $json.body.hubspot_deal_id) || $json.hubspot_deal_id }}' AND t.status='PAID' AND t.paid_at IS NOT NULL ORDER BY t.paid_at DESC LIMIT 1

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ customer: $('1. Cadastra Cliente').first().json.message.customer, company: $('Normalizar').first().json.company, hubspot: $('Normalizar').first().json.hubspot, items: $('Normalizar').first().json.items, payment: $('Normalizar').first().json.payment, prescriptions: $('Normalizar').first().json.prescriptions }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ sales_order: $('2. Cadastra Pedido').first().json.message.sales_order, prescribers: $('Normalizar').first().json.prescribers, patients: $('Normalizar').first().json.patients, fp_patients: $('Normalizar').first().json.fp_patients, item_fpb: $('Normalizar').first().json.item_fpb }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ sales_order: $('2. Cadastra Pedido').first().json.message.sales_order, item_fpb: $('Normalizar').first().json.item_fpb, fpb_map: $('Normalizar').first().json.fpb_map, fpb_name: $('Normalizar').first().json.fpb_name }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ok:true, sales_order: $('2. Cadastra Pedido').first().json.message.sales_order, cliente: $('1. Cadastra Cliente').first().json.message, pacientes: $('3. Cadastra Pacientes + Médico').first().json.message, reservas: $('4. Reserva').first().json.message, recebimento: ($('5. Lançar Recebimento').first().json||{}).message||null, pagamento: $('Normalizar').first().json.payment, liquidacao: ($('Liquidação (config)').first().json||{}).message||null }) }}

parameters.query: =SELECT pt.cpf, pt.receita_path, pt.receita_original_name, pt.assinatura_digital_status FROM validacao_receita.patients pt JOIN validacao_receita.products pr ON pr.id=pt.product_id JOIN validacao_receita.orders o ON o.id=pr.order_id LEFT JOIN validacao_receita.validations v ON v.patient_id=pt.id WHERE o.hubspot_deal_id='{{ ($('Webhook').first().json.body||{}).hubspot_deal_id }}' AND v.status='aprovado' AND pt.receita_path IS NOT NULL

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ doctype:'Sales Order Patient', name: $('Preparar Receitas').item.json.row_name, fieldname:{ receita: ($json.message||{}).file_url, receita_original_name: $('Preparar Receitas').item.json.file_name, receita_status: $('Preparar Receitas').item.json.status } }) }}
